source_note: Authoritative spellcasting mechanics from Keeper Rulebook Chapter 9: Magic (printed p176-180, PDF idx 187-191). These are the structural mechanic values our spells.json stores under casting/learning/mp_economy keys. Verified against the PDF text.

source_pages.casting_p176_177: p176 'Magic points must be expended'; p177 'Casting Spells' Hard POW first cast, push multiplier 1D6
source_pages.learning_p176: p176 'Learning a Spell' 2D6 weeks + Hard INT; learning from person 1D8 days
source_pages.mp_economy_p176: p176 'Magic Points (MP)': initial = one-fifth POW; regen 1/hour (2/hour POW>100); overspill to HP one-for-one; max cannot exceed POW/5
